'''âp-w-n-d''' ('''kapawnedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyoprocess|lyoprocess]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==

|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyoprocess|lyoprocess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-w-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| kapawnedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
